result:
`make` in `wpa_supplicant/` completes cleanly with no errors, and all three binaries build. Summary of changes:

- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now declared as `int os_get_time(struct os_time *t, int clock_source);`
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`, `os_win32.c`, `os_none.c`, `os_internal.c`: definitions updated to match (clock_source currently unused/ignored, preserving existing behavior for `0`).
- All ~28 call sites across `wpa_supplicant/`, `src/ap/`, `src/eap_peer/`, `src/eap_server/`, `src/pae/`, `src/radius/`, `src/tls/`, `src/wps/`, `src/crypto/`, `src/eapol_auth/`, `src/utils/` updated to pass `0` as the second argument.
